title: AnalysisGrid
description: AnalysisGrid: An AnalysisGrid is used to define an area in 3D space that should be analysed for a given set of results, e.g. daylighting levels, wind levels, heat indexes, etc. - an AnalysisGrid can be used to represent a measurable bit of the environment, including a void in a space, or it can be used to represent a mesh on a panel for analysis

InnerCurves.description: The InnerCurves define any openings within the AnalysisGrid which should not be analysed or included in results, such as windows, doors, or atriums

Nodes.description: The Nodes define the geometric points in 3D space that form the analysis points of this grid. Each node in the Nodes property will be analysed in the analysis package

ID.description: The ID of the AnalysisGrid. This should be unique for AnalysisGrids in a collection and is used to refer to result objects in the ObjectId property of result objects

Name.description: The name for the AnalysisGrid to identify it for users

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
